issues.description: Effect completely misses the core mechanic: 'If this Character would be K.O.'d, you may trash 1 card from Life cards instead' should PREVENT the KO and trash a Life card instead. Current DSL only removes 1 Life card without preventing KO.
Action should be 'TrashFromHand' (trashing from Life cards is modeled as trash action), not 'RemoveLife'. The effect protects against KO by trashing a Life card as a cost.
'OnKO' trigger fires after KO; should use a prevention/conditional mechanism. Card text 'would be K.O.'d' indicates a conditional prevention, not a post-KO action.

suggestedDsl.description: If this Character would be K.O.'d, you may trash 1 card from Life cards instead (prevents KO)
